steps.title: Simplify both sides
steps.content: For infinitely many solutions, the equation must be true for every value of $x$. Expand each side: $$a(4x-8)+5a=4ax-8a+5a=4ax-3a$$ $$4(ax-2a)-20=4ax-8a-20$$

steps.title: Match the constant terms
steps.content: The $4ax$ terms already match, so the constant terms must also match: $$-3a=-8a-20$$ $$5a=-20$$ $$a=-4$$

steps.title: Choose the answer
steps.content: Only $a=-4$ makes the two sides identical: both become $-16x+12$. Choice A — -4 only.
